questionHtml: Suggest one other factor that has to be kept constant in all the jars during the experiment.
markschemeHtml:
temperature/volume of indicator/identical jars/number of beads/size of beads / density of Chlorella / other reasonable answer

Do not accept light/pH/humidity.

meta.title: Suggest one other factor that has to be kept constant in all the jars during the experiment.
breadcrumbLabels: C1.3.7. Techniques for varying concentrations of carbon dioxide, light intensity or temperature experimentally to investigate the effects of limiting factors on the rate of photosynthesis
